# Code of Conduct

This project expects respectful, professional collaboration.

## Our standards

Examples of behavior that contribute to a constructive environment:

- giving technical feedback without personal attacks
- assuming good faith while still being rigorous
- welcoming corrections, questions, and different experience levels
- keeping discussion focused on the code, product, and user impact

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

- harassment, intimidation, or discrimination
- insulting or demeaning language
- publishing other people's private information without permission
- repeated bad-faith disruption of reviews, issues, or discussions

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may edit, hide, lock, or remove comments, issues, pull requests, or contributors whose behavior harms the project environment.

## Reporting

Report unacceptable behavior to the maintainers through the repository hosting platform. For security-sensitive matters, use the process in [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) instead of a public report.
